title: urochloa bolbodes
intro: Urochloa bolbodes, also known as the "panic grass" or "native panic grass", is a species of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Urochloa bolbodes include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as having antiviral properties. Urochloa bolbodes can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
